Name: -1_art_shows_way_comes
Representative_Docs: ['I think my father fits this description. He generally likes quality tv shows, movies and animation. He likes good music and is not afraid to expand and watch/listen to new genres.', "This person comes across as genuinely interested in others--when in conversation, it's rarely about themselves. They show a wide knowledge of varied topics. They demonstrate good manners. Their home is clean, decorated in a well-coordinated way. They favor high-quality goods (food, drink, decor, clothes)--not necessarily expensive for the point of being expensive, but well-made, above average things.", "Yes, I know several people who I think have great taste. My grandmothers come to mind, they were ladies to the T but also real women who exuded grace under extreme pressure, made it look so easy to manage home and hearth, raise several children successfully, I mean nobody wants to be the parent of a Jeffrey Dahmer right? The matriarchs of my family instilled in me the belief that I could be anything I wanted and how to be a lady while achieving my goals. I never heard a swear word from either of them, they didn't gossip, run the streets, stir up trouble or have their business aired around town. They were very much the type of women who were gracious, humble, grateful, intelligent, witty and just had this quality about them that is the essence of great taste."]

Name: 0_clothes_look_friend_colors
Representative_Docs: ['This person has good taste because they can dress in style all the time.  Their clothes match and fits nicely.  Their shoes and watch are a good complement to their clothes.', 'I think RR has good taste because she always dresses well with nicely coordinated accessories.  The clothes she picks  are very fits well and the colors patterns seem to blend well.  She never dresses slovenly or wears clothes whose colors and patterns clash.', 'A friend of mine has very good taste in clothes. They wear things that fit their body and style, and they look great.']

Name: 1_music_time_enjoy_enjoys
Representative_Docs: ['I think they have good taste because they think ahead of time and research about products before they buy them. Another person who I think has good taste in music, enjoys similar music to me and dislikes some of the same.', "A friend of mine who doesn't like listening to metal music but who understands the value in it. He also understands the difficulty in performing and how there is a type of music for everyone. This is an example where I would completely disagree with their opinion, but that doesn't necessarily mean they have bad taste. They also enjoy other forms of music that I also enjoy.", "Really anyone who puts time into wanting to create something that speaks to and is generally perceived as 'good' by members of a specific audience. Taste is largely subjective, but also dependent upon the audience. So whereas one audience might perceive a MAGA hat as cheap and distasteful, another audience might look at it as extremely tasteful. If we're looking for a specific person here, I would say that Steve Jobs had good taste. He was able to create things that appealed to a lot of people such that they would use them, find them convenient, and pay money for them. I would call that tasteful in addition to successful."]

Name: 2_friend_best_lot_friends
Representative_Docs: ['I think majority of my close friends have good taste, but especially my best friend. This is because we like the same things, therefore her taste is very similar to my taste.', "My best friend has very good taste, he really puts a lot of effort into making sure that things fit together in an appropriate way and cater to his strengths and weaknesses appropriately. He also does a lot of research online to see other people's tastes and tries to incorporate those things into his own stylistic choices.", "I think my best friend has good taste in art and food. They pay close attention to the subtle details that the artists put into their work and can appreciate the level of depth and details that the artist had. Also in food, while fine dining is not in itself good taste, I think my friend can appreciate unique flavor combinations that most people just hate while they haven't tried them first."]
